THE PERILS OF SCIENTIFIC DOGMA"
"by Aleksandr Konstantinov in collaboration with AI"
"March 2, 2026"
""
"The “mainstream science" is not science, it is a mind virus."
""
"Science, properly understood, is disciplined curiosity: hypothesis, experiment, revision, humility before data. It is a method — a way of reducing bias and error through collective scrutiny."
""
"The virus begins when method hardens into dogma."
""
"Instead of saying, “This is what our current models can explain,” it declares, “This is all that exists.” Instead of remaining provisional, it becomes doctrinal. Instead of inquiry, it performs authority. The invisible becomes unreal by decree. The immeasurable becomes meaningless. Subjective, aesthetic, and spiritual dimensions are dismissed not because they have been falsified, but because they do not fit the dominant frame."
""
"At that point, “science” functions like a quasireligion:"
""
"* It has priests (credentialed interpreters)."
"* It has sacred texts (consensus papers)."
"* It has heresy (ideas outside paradigm)."
"* It has moral signaling disguised as objectivity."
""
"The tragedy is subtle."
""
"The same mindset that once liberated humanity from dogma becomes dogma itself. The spirit of inquiry is replaced by institutional self-protection. The method of doubt is replaced by certainty about what cannot exist."
""
"The deeper issue is not materialism vs mysticism."
""
"It is epistemic humility vs epistemic closure."
""
"When science remains a living process, it expands reality."
""
"When it becomes an ideology, it narrows it."
""
"The cure is not anti-science."
""
"It is meta-scientific awareness: remembering that every model is partial, every framework provisional, and every paradigm historically temporary."
""
"Real science breathes."
""
"The virus calcifies."
"
